_source.extraction_method: firecrawl branding + raw CSS bundle scrape + docs color analysis
_source.authoritative_for: trustworthy high-information financial dashboard — deep navy foundation, indigo/violet accents, pale-blue panels

marketing_vs_dashboard.dashboard: dashboard.stripe.com — uses the docs-family indigo palette

foundation.note: Stripe's signature is the pale-cool-blue panel — #F6F9FC is the canonical 'Stripe panel' color

text.note: #0A2540 is the brand navy used in the wordmark; #061B31 is even deeper, used on dense body

accent_docs_dashboard.note: Stripe docs use an indigo family; marketing uses a more saturated violet-fuchsia. Do NOT mix.

fonts.sans_docs_fallback: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
fonts.mono: 'Source Code Pro', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace

font_weights_default.note: Stripe's default body weight is 300 (light). Unusual — most systems use 400.

spacing.note: Stripe uses very restrained radii — sharper than Linear or Vercel. 4px is dominant.

elevation.note: Stripe shadows are very subtle — layered hairline-ring + tiny drop. Never a harsh drop-shadow.

motion.note: Stripe motion is minimal on content sites; heavy on scroll-tied gradient animations only

signature_effects.panel_pale_blue: #F6F9FC on white — the Stripe dashboard panel look
signature_effects.soft_shadows_only: never harsh drops; always hairline-ring + micro-blur
signature_effects.gradient_hero: violet→fuchsia→pink on a light page; diagonal/scroll-tied
signature_effects.invoice_pattern: signature table layout with tiered pricing rows, subtotal, discount-line — seen on /billing
signature_effects.code_samples_inline: green accents + monospace columns, seen throughout docs
signature_effects.restrained_radius: 4px dominant — sharper than Vercel 6px or Linear 12px
